title: [codereview-2] spec/02-physical-link.md CCP-16: inconsistent RFC2119 usage, undefined norm functions, imprecise measurement methods, missing thresholds table, bead ID formatting
description: Second independent codereview pass on the updated CCP-16 section. Findings: lacks MUST/SHOULD keywords for requirements; normalization not defined (e.g. util_norm = util/100); channel util measurement method vague (prefer TX-time based over RSSI for accuracy); no explicit thresholds table; uses `backticks` for bead unlike other specs; add reference to 04-network or 01-architecture. Tagged codereview. Discovered-from project-LICHEN-da2q.16.5
close_reason: All findings fixed in spec/02-physical-link.md CCP-16 section. Three codereview passes completed with fixes applied after each. Main bead awaits 3 clean passes confirmation.
